events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick's Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still strutting! Mick Jagger continues to prove that rock 'n' roll truly keeps you forever.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981 with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: The Day The Video Star Was Born
angles.copy: Forty-five years since MTV hit the airwaves, forever changing how we consume music. And the first track? A rather ironic one from The Buggles.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis's iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on this day in 1994, launching the band into superstardom.

angles.name: Oasis's Debut Impact
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's your standout track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, commenced on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm for 'three days of peace and music'. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: This day marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years on, we remember the unparalleled impact of Elvis Presley. His voice, his moves, his legacy – truly one of a kind.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: This day marks 30 years since the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Legacy
angles.copy: Three decades since we lost a true lyrical force. Remembering the profound impact and enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: This day marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since Jimi Hendrix changed the game with his guitar. His influence still echoes through rock music today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Enduring Appeal
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs – a timeless masterpiece.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of rock 'n' roll attitude and that unmistakable voice. Happy Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde!

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday LG
angles.copy: Fifty-four years of pure rock 'n' roll swagger. Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! As you were.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine's Enduring Message
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: The iPod's Impact
angles.copy: Twenty-five years since the first iPod dropped. Remember shuffling through your entire music library in your pocket? A game-changer.

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is officially James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Grab a martini, it's James Bond Day! Which 007 film or theme tune gets your vote as the best?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the life and legacy of John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the enduring artistry and vision of John Lennon. Imagine that.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday John Cleese
angles.copy: Eighty-seven years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary John Cleese, a true titan of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, universally known as 'The White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: The White Album's Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered their sprawling, experimental 'White Album'. A true journey through their diverse genius.
